residual_risks: This diff is purely visual (CSS classNames, a Google Font import, and a CSS custom-property-driven color/gradient change) with no new branching, computation, or data transforms, consistent with the plan's stated 'no behavioral change' expectation for every unit in this redesign; no test infrastructure exists in the repo (the 'test' script is just 'next build'), so there is no actionable testing gap to raise here.

The removal of the blog-post-specific BlogParagraph override (pages/blog/[slug].js) changes rendered markup for MDX paragraphs (no more wrapping bg-cyan-100 div), but this is a styling removal with no conditional logic, so it does not introduce an untested code path in the sense this review targets.
